opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I bent over to pick up a dropped pen, and my lower back completely seized up; I haven't been able to get off the floor for two hours.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My lower back seized up bending over and I'm stuck on the floor in severe spasm.

symptom_narrative.onset: 2 hours ago bending to pick up a pen
symptom_narrative.character: intense dull aching lower-back pain with severe muscle spasm
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: can't get off the floor, severe spasm
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: visible muscle spasm; NO pain radiating below the knee, no numbness/pins-and-needles, no leg weakness, no bladder/bowel problems, no saddle numbness; no fever/weight loss/night pain, no major trauma

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; needs help transferring; no fever/weight loss/cancer history

objective_data_offered.value: severe lumbar muscle spasm, tender lower back, can't stand from the floor
legs feel normal — no numbness, tingling or weakness; normal bladder/bowel control
